hero.subtitle: The system has chosen you. Complete quests in the real world, increase your stats and break your limits.

daily.title: Daily Quests
daily.description: Repeatable tasks that strengthen your foundation. Ignoring them leads to penalties.

attribute.title: Attribute Upgrade
attribute.description: Specific challenges that permanently increase your strength, agility or intelligence.

penalty.title: Penalty System
penalty.description: Those who break the rules of the system must face the penalty. Failure is not an option.
